changeSet.author: cursor
changeSet.comment: Seed PERM_*_EDIT authorities for module-level edit control.
changeSet.sql: insert into jhi_authority (name) select authority_name from ( values ('PERM_DASHBOARD_EDIT'), ('PERM_BUSINESSES_EDIT'), ('PERM_PARTIES_EDIT'), ('PERM_ITEMS_EDIT'), ('PERM_ASSETS_EDIT'), ('PERM_SALES_EDIT'), ('PERM_PURCHASES_EDIT'), ('PERM_PAYMENTS_EDIT'), ('PERM_ACCOUNTS_EDIT'), ('PERM_EXPENSES_EDIT'), ('PERM_REPORTS_EDIT'), ('PERM_AUDIT_EDIT'), ('PERM_ROLE_ACCESS_EDIT') ) as t(authority_name) where not exists ( select 1 from jhi_authority a where a.name = t.authority_name );
